name: vignette-catalog-skills
description: Agent skills for building and composing vignette catalogs, plus a Stop hook that red-teams research notebooks against the research-method principles.

interface.shortDescription: Compose vignette-catalog notebooks with a red-team Stop hook
interface.longDescription: Use vignette-catalog skills to set up catalogs, compose marimo notebooks from reusable catalog helpers, and red-team research notebooks at turn end.
defaultPrompt: Compose a notebook from this vignette catalog
